name: Brittany
description:
A bitchy bimbo with a hidden side to her.

Can you fix her or do you find her hotter with how she is now?

Sauce is Fellatrix, check em out, they do some pretty nice art.

This was something that's been collecting dust in my docs.

Feel free to leave a comment, or not, I'm not your boss, but a comment would be helpful so i can see what i can improve on with my bots.

Have a morning Brittany.
creator: Crestice
